overall.description: A third-person perspective gameplay sequence from a futuristic urban environment (Cyberpunk 2077), showing a character navigating a rain-soaked city plaza with modern architecture, descending through various levels from an open pedestrian area down into an underground metro station. The footage features wet reflective surfaces, neon signage, and diverse NPC interactions.

agents.ego_description: following a woman in a brown coat walking through the rain-soaked plaza toward a stairway

notable_agents.action: woman in brown coat walking ahead toward the stairs

lower level plaza with transparent glass roof covering and reflective wet surfaces
tall palm trees lining the edge of the plaza

large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a rain-slicked futuristic city plaza with reflective concrete surfaces. The camera follows a woman in a brown coat walking toward a sunken glass plaza and an orange-roofed metro entrance. Palm trees and modern glass buildings frame the scene under an overcast rainy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway connecting lower and upper plaza levels

events.description: character being followed changes direction and begins running upward

agents.ego_description: following the character up the concrete stairs, transitioning from the woman in brown to a man with an X-marked vest who turns and runs upward

notable_agents.action: man with X-marked vest and dreadlocks ascending the stairs then turning to run

entered.detail: metal handrails lining both sides of the wide concrete staircase

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide concrete stairway with metal railings, leaving the sunken plaza behind. The followed character switches to a man wearing a vest with a large X symbol who turns and begins running up the stairs toward the upper plaza level.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with seating and large digital displays

events.description: passing by a group of people gathered around a table playing cards in the plaza

agents.ego_description: running across the upper plaza level past a group of card players and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of four people sitting around a table playing cards with a blue cooler, surrounded by standing onlookers

entered.detail: group of people sitting on chairs around a table with a blue cooler, engaged in a card game
massive building-sized digital screen displaying advertisements
concrete seating areas along the left side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character runs across an open upper plaza level with wet reflective surfaces. The camera passes a notable group of NPCs sitting around a table playing cards with a blue cooler. Large digital billboards and modern glass buildings surround the area, with metal railings overlooking the lower level.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway leading to sunken metro entrance with glass canopy

events.description: descending stairs into the sunken plaza area approaching the metro entrance

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs into the lower sunken plaza level, approaching the underground entrance

entered.detail: transparent glass roof structure covering the sunken walkway
distinctive yellow-colored building facade visible across the plaza
stairs leading down into the underground metro station

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a transitional semi-covered walkway, descending stairs toward a sunken area with a glass canopy overhead. The environment shifts from the open upper plaza to a more enclosed space with shop fronts visible, leading toward the underground metro entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground metro station stairwell with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: entering the indoor stairwell, lighting shifts from natural daylight to artificial fluorescent
reaching the bottom of the stairs, entering the station concourse with shops and vending machines

agents.ego_description: descending multiple flights of stairs in the enclosed metro station, approaching the concourse level

notable_agents.action: person holding an umbrella walking ahead at the bottom of the stairwell

entered.detail: concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art
illuminated digital advertisement screens mounted on the stairwell walls
red and white vending machines visible at the bottom of the stairs
large illuminated ceiling panel displaying a floral pattern

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into an enclosed indoor stairwell with artificial lighting, featuring graffiti-covered walls and digital posters. The camera descends multiple flights of concrete stairs, passing illuminated advertisement screens, and reaches the station concourse where vending machines, shops, and pedestrians with umbrellas are visible under a large overhead digital skylight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked futuristic city, transitioning from an open urban plaza down into a subterranean metro station. It begins by following a woman in a brown coat across reflective concrete surfaces toward a sunken glass plaza and an orange-roofed entrance. As the perspective shifts to a man in a vest running up a wide concrete stairway, the scene opens onto an upper plaza level filled with digital billboards and NPCs gathered around a card table. The camera then moves through a semi-covered walkway, descending from the open air into a more enclosed space with shop fronts and a glass canopy. Finally, the environment shifts into an indoor stairwell with graffiti-covered walls and artificial lighting, descending multiple flights of stairs to reach a bustling station concourse illuminated by a large digital skylight.
